basic_details.job_title: BHU Varanasi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate I Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate I
basic_details.short_information: Banaras Hindu University Varanasi (BHU) has published the Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate I Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment is being conducted for the post of Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate I under a project-based appointment. Candidates meeting the age criteria as per DBT guidelines and holding an M.Tech. or M.Sc. in Geospatial Sciences, Applied Geography and Geoinformatics, Geomatics, Geoinformatics, or a related discipline with at least 60% marks (NET/ GATE qualification required for the JRF position) are eligible to apply via email on or before

age_limit.details: Junior Research Fellow: As per DBT guidelines. Project Associate I: As per DBT guidelines.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech/ M.Sc. in Geospatial Sciences/ Applied Geography and Geoinformatics, Geomatics, Geoinformatics or related subject with at least 60% marks. NET/ GATE qualified for JRF.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: M.Tech/M.Sc. degree in Geospatial Sciences/Applied Geography and Geoinformatics, Geomatics, Geoinformatics or related subject with at least 60% marks. Qualified NET/GATE. Project Associate I: MSc degree with at least 60% marks in Geospatial Sciences/Applied Geography and Geoinformatics, Geomatics, Geoinformatics or related subject.

salary_details.pay_scale: JRF: Rs. 31000/- pm + HRA; Project Associate I: Rs. 25000/- pm + HRA
salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow: Rs. 31000/- pm + HRA as per the Government of India rules Project Associate I: Rs. 25000/- pm + HRA as per the Government of India rules

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BHU Varanasi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BHU Varanasi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the BHU Varanasi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download BHU Varanasi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BHU Varanasi Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow: M.Tech/M.Sc. degree in Geospatial Sciences/Applied Geography and Geoinformatics, Geomatics, Geoinformatics or related subject with at least 60% marks. Qualified NET/GATE. Project Associate I: MSc degree with at least 60% marks in Geospatial Sciences/Applied Geography and Geoinformatics, Geomatics, Geoinformatics or related subject.

content_sections.heading: BHU Varanasi Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow: As per DBT guidelines. Project Associate I: As per DBT guidelines.

content_sections.heading: BHU Varanasi Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow: Rs. 31000/- pm + HRA as per the Government of India rules Project Associate I: Rs. 25000/- pm + HRA as per the Government of India rules

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for BHU Varanasi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BHU Varanasi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate I positions at BHU Varanasi is 04-08-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: For the Junior Research Fellow position, candidates must have an M.Tech/M.Sc. degree in Geospatial Sciences or a related field with at least 60% marks and must be NET/GATE qualified.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for the Project Associate I position?
faq.answer: The Project Associate I will receive a salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month plus HRA, as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email to [email protected] with complete biodata and self-attested documents.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for both Junior Research Fellow and Project Associate I positions is as per DBT guidelines.

faq.question: Q7. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: Banaras Hindu University Varanasi (BHU Varanasi) is conducting this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate I positions will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the minimum qualification required for Project Associate I?
faq.answer: For the Project Associate I role, candidates need an MSc degree with at least 60% marks in Geospatial Sciences or a related subject.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
